--- title: "Crop Section" section: crops updated: 2026-02-25 --- ## 🌾 Crop Update ### Soil Conditions - **South**: Good, warming up - **Midlands**: Reasonable - **North**: Wet, delayed ### Planting Progress - Winter wheat: 85% in ground - Winter barley: 90% in ground - Spring barley: Orders being placed
